ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the variable measured */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the county */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the disease */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the variable */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (pending, completed, invalid) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county's centroid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable (e.g., Specimens collected, Total deaths) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., count, percentage) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., integer, float) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_logged_in_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the assigned role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "expired_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role expires (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_disease_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the county */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the disease */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "specimens_collected" INTEGER /* Number of specimens collected */,
  "tests_completed" INTEGER /* Number of tests completed */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of newly reported deaths */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_disease_data_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_disease_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
column_names: Status of the test (pending, completed, invalid)
User ID of the last updater
Timestamp when the record was created
Timestamp when the record was last updated
Name of the variable (e.g., Specimens collected, Total deaths)
Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst)
Timestamp when the user account was created
Indicates if the user account is active
Contact phone number of the user
Unique identifier for each role assignment
Role ID of the assigned role
Timestamp when the role was assigned
Timestamp when the role expires (if applicable)
Unique identifier for each data record
